r7.i0: The drop-in player front-end now has a floating "🏸 Host" invite button + speech bubble ("Want to host your own games?") in the bottom-right: one tap opens the host console in a new tab so players can start their own group too — it helps spread this tool and doesn't affect any existing flow

r6.i0: New "Lock court" feature: every court card gets a 🔒 Lock button. Once you lock a court, drop-in players can't self-join or queue on it (they see "This court has been locked by the host"), while you can still seat people manually — handy for gathering players onto a just-emptied court without others grabbing the open spots; tap 🔓 to unlock when you're done

r0.i0: 🔊 New "Voice announcements": when a game ends (your button, or a successful on-court vote), your phone plays a ding-dong-ding chime and announces "Court N finished. ○○, ○○, you're up — please come on court"; hook up a Bluetooth speaker and the whole venue hears it
r0.i1: How to use: tap 🔊 at the top right of the in-session admin page to turn it on (it speaks a test line so you can check the volume; the setting is remembered). Announcements follow the interface language, and custom court names are spoken
r0.i2: 📱 iPhone notes: after opening the page, tap 🔊 or anywhere on the screen once to unlock speech; while announcements are on the screen stays awake automatically, and even if you turn it off manually, background audio keeps announcements running where the device allows (varies by model — test yours; this also keeps your Bluetooth speaker from auto-sleeping); on older iPhones (iOS 16 and below), flip the side mute switch back to ring
r0.i3: Announcements are spoken twice; when several courts finish at once they queue up and play one by one instead of talking over each other. If the device has no voice for the interface language (e.g. Japanese UI without a Japanese voice installed), it falls back to Chinese/English instead of staying silent

r1.i0: The invite area now has "↗ Share to LINE group / social": send the join link with ready-made text in one tap-no more copy-pasting

r2.i0: ⚡ Faster all around: admin actions respond instantly, typing stays smooth with lots of members, pages open quicker; simultaneous grabs for the same spot no longer clash
r2.i1: 📱 Turn the screen off and back on and the admin page updates to the latest state right away (before, it could take a minute or need a manual refresh)

r3.i0: New "Public sign-up" feature: turn it on when hosting and drop-in players can register and message you without a password; the admin page has a dedicated "🙋 Drop-in sign-up review" area where you approve them to join (people who know the password still enter directly)
r3.i1: Sign-ups can bring family: the review area labels them "👨‍👩‍👧 Brought by XX" and you approve them one by one, same as the shared-phone family mechanism
r3.i2: You can set a "sign-up quota": people can still register once it's full and you decide who to accept; ongoing meetups on the home page show a "🙋 N signed up" reminder
r3.i3: When hosting you can fill in a "meetup intro" (level, fees, notes…), shown together with the contact link on the drop-in players' home page; you can also edit it later in "⚙️ Settings"
r3.i4: The court card's "Queue" row adds "⇄ Swap with another court": each side can pick several players and the counts need not match (you can also just move players over/across); after swapping, each court queues at most 4, and you're warned if it exceeds that

r4.i0: Added advanced "Fair Play" (in ⚙️ Settings): hold back players who've played too much so those who've played less get a turn; toggle anytime, adjustable parameters, with sensible defaults
r4.i1: The admin "Ongoing meetups" list shows "🏸 N playing" so you can see at a glance which sessions are in play

r5.i0: You can set the host avatar in "⚙️ Settings" (one per host, shared across all meetups; defaults to 🐰 if unset)
r5.i1: Up to 7 meetups open at once (end an old one first when you hit the limit) to avoid opening too many by mistake
r5.i2: When hosting you can optionally add a "contact host link"; the hosting form drops "temporary join" (add players after entering instead)
r5.i3: You can put a "contact host link" (LINE group, sign-up form, etc.) in "⚙️ Settings" so drop-in players can reach you in one tap from their home page
r5.i4: Court status now syncs in real time and uses less data
r5.i5: Password / time / rename meetup are now tucked into "⚙️ Settings"
r5.i6: You can vote to end a court; ending and undoing can be done at the same time
r5.i7: Drop-in fee marking + a "show only unpaid" filter
r5.i8: Family guests need host approval, and member management shows avatars
r5.i9: Picking a city/county reveals the matching "district" dropdown
r5.i10: You're automatically prompted to update when a new version is available
